nasb.text: He did evil in the sight of the Lord, and followed the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, with which he made Israel sin; he did not turn from them.

esv.text: He did what was evil in the sight of the Lord and followed the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, which he made Israel to sin; he did not depart from them.

cnv.text: 他行耶和華看為惡的事，隨從尼八的兒子耶羅波安使以色列人陷於罪中的那些罪，不肯轉離。

ccb.text: 约哈斯做耶和华视为恶的事，重蹈尼八的儿子耶罗波安的覆辙，使以色列人陷入罪中。他始终没有离开那些罪。
